title: Kawasaki, Kanagawa — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kawasaki, Kanagawa: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kawasaki is a city in Kanagawa with a population of 1,539,000. An industrial powerhouse with a growing arts scene, riverside parks, and convenient commuter access to Tokyo.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
